subcodes.title: Lawh-i-'Azim
subcodes.first_line: The evanescent servant hath received thy letter, which testifieth to thy steadfastness in God and thy turning unto Him, and hath found [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد بلغ الخادم الفانی کتابک الذی کان مدلا علی تمسکک بالله و رجوعک الیه و وجدت
subcodes.subjects: @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @rebellion and sedition; disobedience, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @useful occupation; acquisition of a craft; trade; profession, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
